steps.title: Set up the ratio
steps.content: The ratio of $m$ to $n$ is given as 7 to 10, so $$m/n = \frac{7}{10}$$.

steps.title: Apply the same factor to both terms
steps.content: Multiplying $m$ by 19 gives $19m$. To keep the ratio unchanged, we must multiply $n$ by the same factor: $$(19m)/(19n) = m/n = \frac{7}{10}$$. Thus $n$ is also multiplied by 19. The answer is 19.
